page = <Page url='https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com/web/index.php/admin/saveSystemUser'>

    def test_Admin_page(self,page):
        login = LoginPage(page)
        dashboard = DashboardPage(page)
    
        login.load()
        login.login("Admin", "admin123")
    
        dashboard.verify_admin_adding_new_user()

self = <orange_hrm.pages.dashboard.DashboardPage object at 0x000001A720BBF380>

    def adding_user_details(self):
        username = "vimal" + str(int(time.time()))
        password = "Admin@123"
    
        dropdowns = self.page.locator("div.oxd-select-text")
    
        # Role
        dropdowns.nth(0).click()
        self.page.locator(".oxd-select-option", has_text="Admin").click()
    
        # ✅ Employee selection (FIXED)
        field = self.page.get_by_placeholder("Type for hints...")
    
        field.click()
        field.fill("a")  # broader search
    
        options = self.page.locator(".oxd-autocomplete-option")
    
        expect(options.first).to_be_visible(timeout=10000)
    
        # 👇 IMPORTANT: pick a valid one reliably
        options.first.click()
    
        # ✅ VERIFY selection happened (CRITICAL)
        selected_value = field.input_value()
        print("Selected employee:", selected_value)
    
        assert selected_value != "", "Employee NOT selected"
    
        errors = self.page.locator(".oxd-input-field-error-message")
    
        if errors.count() > 0:
            print("Before Save Errors:", errors.all_text_contents())
        # Status
        dropdowns.nth(1).click()
        self.page.locator(".oxd-select-option", has_text="Enabled").click()
    
        # Username
        self.page.locator('input.oxd-input').nth(1).fill(username)
    
        # Password
        password_fields = self.page.locator('input[type="password"]')
        password_fields.nth(0).fill(password)
        password_fields.nth(1).fill(password)
    
        # Save
        self.page.get_by_role("button", name="Save").click()
    
        # ✅ Wait properly
